acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] ReplRig can run without `BD_STORE_ID`.
- [ ] Slow e2e validates store discovery and replication convergence.
- [ ] No writes outside ./tmp.
description:
**Problem**
Multi-daemon tests force `BD_STORE_ID`, so we never validate real store discovery via remote URL canonicalization. That is the default deployment path.
design:
**Design**
- Add a ReplRig option to disable `BD_STORE_ID` env override.
- Build nodes by cloning the same remote and verify all daemons discover the same store_id from remotes.
- Add a slow e2e that creates issues on each node and asserts convergence + matching store_id.
title: Store discovery e2e without BD_STORE_ID

description:
**Problem**
Some boundary layers still accept raw strings for IDs/slugs, risking invalid values slipping through.

**Design**
Audit CLI/IPC entrypoints and replace raw string handling with strong types (BeadId/BeadSlug/ActorId) as early as possible. Add validation helpers for common parse paths and remove fallible unwraps.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Parsing/validation centralized
- [ ] No new unwraps
- [ ] Tests cover invalid inputs

**Files:** src/cli/*, src/daemon/ipc.rs, src/core/identity.rs
title: Boundary ID/slug type tightening

description: MutationEngine currently rejects parent/dependency updates and delete because TxnDeltaV1 + apply_event only cover bead_upsert/note_append. Implement bead_delete + dep_upsert/dep_delete in core wire/event/apply, update CBOR encoding/decoding, and wire mutation planning to support create-with-deps, add/remove dep, set parent, delete.
title: Phase 4: add dep/delete ops to TxnDelta + apply

description:
**Problem**
We need an approved design for a Rust-first downstream library surface, plus a clear decision on whether to remove the current Go-compat export/mirroring path.

**Design**
Use brainstorming to produce an approved spec covering crate ownership, public API shape, daemon/autostart behavior, error model, verification, and follow-up implementation slicing.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Spec written and reviewed
- [ ] Public API direction approved
- [ ] Follow-up implementation plan written

**Files:** docs/superpowers/specs, docs/superpowers/plans, crates/beads, crates/beads-daemon, crates/beads-rs
title: Design Rust SDK facade and Go-compat removal strategy
